Fire.description: Sets enemies on fire, dealing heavy damage with a chance to inflict burn.

Ice.description: Launches a shard of concentrated cold at the target, with a small chance to freeze them solid.

Wind.description: Conjures a sharp gust of cutting wind that strikes quickly and with reliable accuracy.

Earth.description: Hurls a jagged chunk of rock at the target, trading accuracy for solid damage and a chance to critically strike.

Water.description: Unleashes a pressurized torrent of water that batters the target with steady, reliable force.

Light.description: Fires a swift bolt of radiant light that deals modest damage with exceptional accuracy.

Dark.description: Releases a wave of shadowy energy that deals heavy damage, though its dark nature makes it hard to aim.

Thunder.description: Calls down three erratic bolts of lightning that each carry high critical potential and a small chance to stun.

Poison.description: Conjures a toxic cloud that deals magical damage and reliably inflicts poison on the target.

Heal.description: Channels restorative magic to heal a significant amount of the caster's HP.
